benefits.description: dramatic increase in information recall and retention, photographic memory ability, 10-12 digit recall with ease, memories became permanent fixtures
improved sleep cycle and circadian rhythm regulation

protocol_notes: 30mg total course (2.5mg x 12 days). User hypothesizes mechanism involves telomerase production, telomere lengthening, melatonin secretion repair, and improved DNA expression leading to higher quality memory formation.
